text: **Anna:** Hi there!
**Anna:** Washington DC has many {fun|楽しい|/fʌn/|We had a fun day at the park.} {places|場所|/pleɪsɪz/|This is my favorite place.} to eat, but
**Anna:** Sometimes it's more fun to {cook|料理する|/kʊk/|I love to cook for my family.}
**Anna:** In fact, tonight, Marsha and I are {cooking|料理する|/ˈkʊkɪŋ/|We are cooking a delicious meal.} for friends
**Anna:** Well, she is {cooking|料理する|/ˈkʊkɪŋ/|She is cooking pasta tonight.}
**Anna:** I am doing the {shopping|買い物|/ˈʃɑːpɪŋ/|I am shopping for groceries.}
**Anna:** It's Marcia.
**Anna:** Hi Marsha.
**Marsha:** Hi Anna, do you have the {shopping|買い物|/ˈʃɑːpɪŋ/|My shopping list is very long.} list?
**Anna:** Yes, I told you I have the {shopping|買い物|/ˈʃɑːpɪŋ/|I finished my shopping list.} list.
**Anna:** Can you hear it?
**Marsha:** Okay, good.
**Anna:** I hear the list
**Marsha:** Anna, please buy all the {ingredients|材料|/ˌɪnˈɡriːdiənts/|We need fresh ingredients for cooking.} on the {list|リスト/一覧|/lɪst/|Check the items on the list.}.
**Anna:** Yes, Marsha, I will.
**Marsha:** And do not spend too much time {shopping|買い物|/ˈʃɑːpɪŋ/|Stop shopping and come home.}
**Anna:** No, Marsha, I won't.
**Anna:** See you later.
**Anna:** Sometimes Marcia worries too much.
**Anna:** I love {shopping|買い物|/ˈʃɑːpɪŋ/|I enjoy shopping on weekends.} and I did not spend too much money.
**Anna:** Oh no, but I did spend too much time.
**Anna:** I have to return home.
**Marsha:** Now, Anna, what took you so long?
**Marsha:** Our {guests|ゲスト|/ˈɡests/|We invited guests for dinner.} will be here soon.
**Anna:** Don't worry, Marsha.
**Anna:** I bought everything on the list.
**Marsha:** Let me see.
**Anna:** You bought a {bunch|房/束|/bʌntʃ/|A bunch of flowers for you.} of bananas, a box of {pancake|パンケーキ|/ˈpænkeɪk/|Let's make pancake for breakfast.} mix.
**Anna:** A bag of coffee.
**Marsha:** Anna, this is all wrong.
**Anna:** What do you mean {wrong|間違った/誤った}?
**Anna:** I bought
**Anna:** A jar of {peanut|ピーナッツ} butter, and a {loaf|パン一斤} of bread.
**Anna:** No wait.
**Anna:** Two {loaves|パンの複数形} of bread
**Marsha:** Anna, these are the wrong {ingredients|材料/食材}.
**Anna:** These {ingredients|材料} are all on the list.
**Anna:** I took this list from the {counter|カウンター/台}.
**Marsha:** Anna, this is the shopping list for {breakfast|朝食}.
**Anna:** I said take the shopping list on the {refrigerator|冷蔵庫} for dinner.
**Anna:** Marcia, there was no shopping list on the {refrigerator|冷蔵庫} for dinner.
**Anna:** Oh no!
**Anna:** It's on the floor!
**Marsha:** What are we going to do?
**Anna:** When do our {guests|お客様/来客} arrive?
**Marsha:** They arrive in {thirty|30/三十} minutes.
**Anna:** I can {fix|修理する/直す} this.
**Marsha:** Do you {trust|信頼する} me?
**Marsha:** Do I have to?
**Anna:** Yes
